name: Butter Cream Filled Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 0:30
Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Grease cookie sheets well.
COOKIES:
1. Melt margarine in a large saucepan. Add the remaining cookie ingredients and mix thoroughly.
2. Drop by scant teaspoonfuls onto prepared cookie sheets. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until golden brown. Cool for 2 minutes, then remove carefully from cookie sheets to wire rack.
FILLING:
1. Combine 1 tablespoon flour and 1 tablespoon sugar in a saucepan.
2. Gradually add 2/3 cup milk and 2 egg yolks (or 1 whole egg). Mix well.
3. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture boils and is thick. Cool.
4. Cream margarine, then add 1/4 cup sugar, creaming well. Gradually add the egg mixture, beating well after each addition. Cover and store in the refrigerator until ready to use.
